eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 5:59 PM on JUN 9, 2019 Effective until 6:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test. Test only from Faribault County Sheriff's Office. This is a test. Test only from Faribault County Sheriff's Office.
